content:
守密人你好：
       弥萨格大学校务处已经于12月15日19:30进行校内设施修复，本次更新无需下载补丁，已经生效。对于更新可能给大家带来的不便，我们会准备一份补给物资以示歉意。祝大家调查顺利！ 
   
【补给物资】
在线维护补偿：银芯*50
   
【领取条件】
领取时间截至2025年12月29日23:59。请记得及时前往邮箱领取补给物资哦。  
  
【更新内容】
一、课题纪录调整预告
● 后续将在购买「高级课题」和「核心课题」界面中增加明确的本期持续时间及特殊规则说明：课题持续周期通常为 28 天，有时会只持续 14 天。持续 14 天的课题会标注本期课题经验翻倍，直接激活与升级核心课题所需源液与所获银芯从 1280/780 降低为 980/390。
● 这项调整能够使得特殊周期的核心课题纪录定价更加合理。我们将在后续的版本中实装以上改动，并于实装后 24 小时内为过往直接激活与升级过 14 天核心课题的守密人补发与价格调整相差的源液。

二、问题修复
● 修复了造物时灵摆「均衡」、时灵摆「赐福」、时灵摆「移涌」、时灵摆「疫症」、时灵摆「投射」、时灵摆「衍化」仅于首场战斗生效，后续战斗失效的问题。
● 修复了星辰篇「棱彩透镜」实际效果仅提供了 1％ 中毒与反击增益的问题，正确的增益幅度应为 10％，和描述一致。
● 修复了时灵摆「衍化」的获取「指令卡」效果能够在单回合内多次触发的问题，应和描述一致仅能触发 1 次。

**Online Maintenance Announcement**

Dear Keeper,
    The Mythag University Administration Office will conduct facility repairs on December 15 at 19:30(UTC+8).The update is effective without needing to download a patch . We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and will provide a supply package as compensation. Happy investigating!
     
【Supply Package】
Maintenance Compensation: Silver*50
     
【Claim Conditions】
Claim period ends on December 29 2025(UTC+8), at 23:59. Please remember to check your mailbox to claim the supply package.
      
【Update Content】
1. Curriculum Adjustment Announcement
● In the future, a clear indication of the current duration and special rules will be added to the purchase interface for "Advanced Topics" and "Premium Topics": The duration of the topics usually lasts for 28 days, but sometimes only for 14 days. Topics lasting 14 days will be marked with double EXP for this period, and the Silver Prime required for activating and upgrading the Premium Topics will be reduced from 1280/780 to 980/390.
● This adjustment will make the pricing of special period Premium Topics more reasonable. We will implement the above changes in future versions and will compensate Keepers who directly activated or upgraded Premium Topics within the last 14 days with the difference in Silver Prime within 24 hours after the implementation.

2. Problem Fix
● Fixed the issue where the Relics Chrono Pendulum: "Balance", Chrono Pendulum: "Benediction", Chrono Pendulum: "Flux", Chrono Pendulum: "Plague", Chrono Pendulum: "Projection", and Chrono Pendulum: "Evolution" only took effect in the first battle and became ineffective in subsequent battles.
● Fixed the issue where the "Prismatic Lens" in Astral Reign only provided a 1% increase to Poison and Counter, the correct increase should be 10%, consistent with the description.
● Fixed the issue where the Chrono Pendulum's "Evolution" effect of gaining a "Command Card" could trigger multiple times in a single turn; it should only trigger once, consistent with the description.
Is there any way we can get the discount somehow still, I already bought the advanced topic and not the premium topic.
Do we get a refund if we already bought it?
How come the premium topic would cost 980 instead of exactly half, which would be 730 or 640 discount?
ok I get the maths, it's actually fair lol

Also you might want to also mention that it's retroactive on past dailies (I assume?), that was unexpected, but welcome to see I still got my today's daily x3 even after  having already received my daily reward but buying the premium topic after
